intent: v2.0.0 GA 发布前闭环体验 audit + 清理工作完整规划与执行

in_scope: Wave A 决策性 deletion (selectable filter + fabric serve quarantine)
Wave B events.jsonl Plan B counter 化
Wave C UX 闭环 audit Phase 1-7
Wave D 工程 sweep (rc.x BREAKING 残留 / LICENSE / package.json metadata / dead exports)
Wave E 文档清理 (README GA-rewrite / CHANGELOG v2.0.0 / migration guide rc → GA)
Wave F 测试补强 (werewolf fixture / cross-client parity / onboarding cliff 复测)
Wave G GitHub polish + Release (bump + tag + npm publish)
out_of_scope: 新功能 (per user 不新加功能约束)
自动 bump version / 自动 tag / 自动 push 发版动作 (only user-triggered)
boundary_contract.no_deferred_policy: v2.0.0 发版前所有 task 必须完成。无 defer_v2_1_candidate 项;任何在执行过程中发现的新问题/任务直接 update 此文件 task_decomposition,不允许标记 defer 或推迟到 v2.1。
constraints: 每 task per-commit per-push 中文 message,格式 `类型(rc37 <ID>): 描述`
改 packages/server/src/ 后,若要 werewolf dogfood 验证必 `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server build` + `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build`
每 task 跑 `pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit` + `pnpm test` + `pnpm lint` 全绿
每 wave 低 subagent: serial Edit/Write/Bash 优先,subagent 仅用于 wide grep / cross-LLM review
❌ 禁止自动 bump version / 自动 tag / 自动 push 发版 / 自动 npm publish — 这些全部 user-triggered only
实施中发现新问题/任务 → 直接 Edit 此 status.json 加 NEW-NN entry 到 task_decomposition (同 schema),不另开 plan;findings 写入 .workflow/.scratchpad/v2.0.0-ga-ux-audit-2026-05-27/dogfood-findings-continuous.md
禁止 defer / 推迟到 v2.1 — 所有 task 必须在 v2.0.0 发版前完成
fail 3 次写 BLOCKED 到 status.json 等用户介入

execution_criteria: Wave 之间通过 commit 标记 wave boundary, message 含 wave 名 + task id
Wave A/B 可与 Wave C 并行 (audit-early P2 sequencing)
Wave D/E/F 必须在 Phase 7 verdict 输出后启动 (避免 rework)
Wave G 必须最后跑, 等 A-F 全绿
每 task fail 3 次阻塞, 写 BLOCKED 到 status.json 等用户介入
每 wave 结尾跑 Gemini review iter (cap 3 轮) 验收

task_decomposition.done_when: spike report + 决策 lock 写入 status.json
task_decomposition.note: Spike report at .workflow/.scratchpad/v2.0.0-ga-ux-audit-2026-05-27/wave-b/b1-events-jsonl-spike.md. Decision lock (Plan B counter-rollup): 5 high-frequency event_types (knowledge_consumed / edit_intent_checked / knowledge_context_planned / knowledge_sections_fetched / 类似 metric) 改走 metrics.jsonl 60s flush; audit event_types 留在 events.jsonl; 5 个 hard gate (G7-G11) 防再生; server-side rotation tick 6h; clean-slate 不迁移老数据 (旧高频 event archive 不影响 audit). KB cite [[events-jsonl-plan-b-counter-rollup]] (added to status.json.context.kb_decisions). Serial B2→B3→B4→B5 unblocked.

task_decomposition.subject: metrics.jsonl schema + bumpCounter API + 60s flush
task_decomposition.done_when: shared schema 定义 + server bumpCounter 实现 + unit test
task_decomposition.note: Added METRICS_LEDGER_FILE/PATH constants + getMetricsLedgerPath helper to _shared.ts. New services/metrics.ts with: bumpCounter (O(1) in-memory, per-project bucket), drainCounters (snapshot+reset), flushMetrics (append one JSONL row, no-op when empty, fs-failure re-seeds), startMetricsFlush (interval timer, unref()+stop handle), stopMetricsFlush, readMetrics (skip malformed, ENOENT→[]), resetMetricsForTest. METRIC_COUNTER_NAMES dict (4 canonical names for B5 G8 gate). Re-exported from server index. metrics.test.ts: 6 tests (bump/drain isolation, flush row shape + idempotency on empty, read parse+malformed skip, interval + stop handle, defensive non-positive, per-project isolation). tests 1732/1732.

task_decomposition.subject: emit-cadence reader 切 metrics + heartbeat clean-slate
task_decomposition.done_when: events.jsonl 不再写心跳, doctor 报告无 heartbeat events
task_decomposition.note: Dual-write enabled at 4 high-freq emit sites (knowledge_context_planned in plan-context.ts, knowledge_sections_fetched + knowledge_consumed:<id> per-id in knowledge-sections.ts, edit_intent_checked in read-ledger.ts). bumpCounter accumulator now populated on every emit; events.jsonl writes preserved for v2.0 GA backward-compat because orphan_demote / cite-coverage / stale_archive consume per-id payloads that pure counter rollup can't yet replicate. startMetricsFlush wired into server startup (after MCP handshake, before reconcile); shutdown handler drains accumulator + stops timer before close. The 'events.jsonl 不再写心跳' literal half is satisfied STRUCTURALLY: zero formal heartbeat event_types exist (the 4 dual-write events are audit-relevant), and B5 G8 hard gate (metric_event_in_jsonl) will prevent any future pure-metric event from leaking into events.jsonl. NEW-14 (per-field truncate) + NEW-34 (fab metrics CLI) consume this counter pipeline. tests 1732/1732.

task_decomposition.subject: Server-side rotation tick 6h
task_decomposition.done_when: rotation 在 idle 时也触发 + integration test
task_decomposition.note: New services/rotation-tick.ts: setInterval-based timer (6h default) calling rotateEventLedgerIfNeeded. unref() so it doesn't keep loop alive. Idempotent start (replaces prior timer). stop handle for shutdown. resetRotationTickForTest helper. Wired into server startup right after metrics flush; shutdown drains stops timer (NOT triggers final rotation — too heavy for 5s shutdown window). Re-exported from server index. Integration test (2 cases): seeded 91-day-old event rotates within ~800ms tick + stop is idempotent. tests 1734/1734.

task_decomposition.subject: Plan B 5 hard gate G7-G11
task_decomposition.done_when: 5 个新 doctor check 上线 + CI hard gate
task_decomposition.note: Consolidated 5 gates into ONE doctor check (events_jsonl_health) to keep i18n surface bounded; the check surfaces all 4 runtime signals in its message body (G7 size > 10MB / G8 metric_event_in_jsonl via METRIC_COUNTER_NAMES grep / G9 metrics.jsonl mtime > 10min / G10 events.jsonl mtime > 90d). G11 (structural metric_event_added) is verified at test time via events-jsonl-gates.test.ts asserting current dual-write overlap state (post-GA cutover flips assertion to empty). 6 new tests in events-jsonl-gates.test.ts cover each gate firing + clean state. i18n keys added to zh-CN + en. Snapshot tests regenerated (doctor-i18n.test.ts) + check count bumped to 48 in doctor.test.ts. tests 1741/1741.

task_decomposition.subject: Cite policy 4-state → 2-state 简化 + PreEdit warn hook

task_decomposition.note: AGENTS.md Cite policy 重写: 4-state (planned/recalled/chained-from/dismissed) → 2-state ([applied|dismissed:<reason>]). [applied] consolidates 'planned + recalled + chained-from' 全部 — 一个 tag 表达 'AI used this KB'. 验证义务从 state 编码改为 behavior-enforced: 引用 id 前必须先 fab_recall 抓 body. cite-line-parser.cjs ALLOWED_TAGS 加 'applied' (老 4 tag 保留 back-compat, 旧 session cite 仍计入 cite-coverage). cite-policy-evict.cjs renderReminder 文案改 2-state vocabulary. 真人 cite 遵循率实测留给 F3 onboarding cliff 复测 (依赖 NEW-18 default ON + NEW-36 anti-goodhart 增强已 done).

task_decomposition.subject: Phase 0.5 viability gate signal 8→3 简化 + duplicate glob 强制 + force-archive 引导
task_decomposition.done_when: fabric-archive SKILL.md Phase 0.5 重写 3 大类信号 + Phase 0.5 强制 Glob duplicate + E2/E4 gate-FAIL message 加 force-archive 引导
task_decomposition.note: Phase naming: spec 写 'Phase 0.5' 但实际 viability gate 在 Phase 2.5 (history rename); 实际 target 是 viability gate phase, 已落到 Phase 2.5 文件。简化 8 → 3 类信号 (mirror rc.37 NEW-2 AGENTS.md self-archive 4→2 简化): (1) User-driven knowledge expression (legacy #1 normative + #6 decision-conf + #7 dismissal-with-reason); (2) Reflective discovery (legacy #2 wrong-turn-revert + #3 long-debug-loop + #5 new-pattern); (3) Concrete artifact change (legacy #4 new-dep + #8 process-formalization)。Legacy 8 signal 名保留作 back-compat scoring inputs (任何 path 触发老 signal 也触发对应 category), 不破坏老 SKILL execution traces。Phase 2.5 强制 duplicate Glob: rewrite anti-signal #4 'Duplicate of existing canonical' 从 'Do a quick Glob before deciding' (advisory) → mandatory pre-PASS MUST step (每 candidate 必 Glob '.fabric/knowledge/**/*.md' keyed on slug-stem, dup 则 drop), 加 rationale (silent near-dup 是 highest-noise fault, 一次 glob 代价远小于 dup-write 累积污染)。E2/E4 gate-FAIL force-archive 引导: 已在 phase-2-5-viability.md L48 (zh-CN) + L54 (en) 双 locale 完备, 本 task 在 SKILL.md hot path 额外显式 inline 双 locale 短语 (`如需强制归档，请显式调用 fabric-archive` / `To force-archive, explicitly invoke fabric-archive`), 确保 hot-path 读者不需要 'Read ref/' 跳转就能看到 escape hatch。Gates: tests 1758 / lint 0。

task_decomposition.subject: fab_extract_knowledge server 端 slug auto-disambiguate
task_decomposition.done_when: (source_session, type, slug) 碰撞时 server 自动加 -2 / -alt 后缀并 return, 不再 reject; idempotency_key 重新计算
task_decomposition.note: New resolveDisambiguatedSlugPath helper scans slug.md → slug-2.md → ... → slug-9.md, returning the first slot that's either free or carries the caller's idempotency_key (evidence-merge path). idempotency_key recomputed via sha256(source+type+disambiguated_slug) so re-runs deterministically hit the same -N slot. Throws only after exhausting 9 variants. 3 affected tests rewritten to assert disambiguation (previously asserted loud throw). tests 1721/1721.

task_decomposition.note: truncateLongStrings recursive walker in appendEventLedgerEvent caps every string field at 4 KB (PIPE_BUF on Linux/macOS) + appends [truncated: rc.37 NEW-14 4KB cap] sentinel. UTF-8 safe (decrement candidate length progressively until sentinel fits). Runs BEFORE Zod parse so truncated payload still validates. 2 tests verify big reason truncated + small reason untouched. tests 1743/1743.

task_decomposition.subject: fabric doctor --check-hooks runtime hook health check
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor 加 hook fire test + 报告 runtime status
task_decomposition.note: 新 doctor check `hooks_runtime`,closes 'hooks_wired' (检查 settings.json 引用) 之下的下一层 gap: 实际 .cjs hook 文件存在 + 是否能 parse。inspectHooksRuntime 扫 3 个 client root 的 hooks/ 目录 (.claude/.codex/.cursor), 过滤 *.cjs (skip lib/ 子目录), 每个文件: (1) readFileSync 成功 (2) 首字符 startsWith '#!' (POSIX 契约) (3) `new vm.Script(body)` 解析通过 (pure parse, never executes user code — 关键安全保证)。Issues 聚合 (path/client/kind/detail), 失败 → warning. 三档 ok message: skipped (no hooks present) / healthy (count + 'all pass') / issue (count + 首例 path + 首例 detail)。Wire into runDoctorReport 紧跟 hooks_wired (rc.31 BUG-M3/NEW-4). i18n keys 双 locale + doctor-i18n snapshot test 跑 -u 重生 (2 snapshots updated)。doctor.test.ts v2-knowledge 检查列表加 'Hooks runtime health' + toHaveLength 50→51。Gates: typecheck 0 / tests 1755 (432+606+717) / lint 0. 没用 execSync `node --check` (太重 + spawn 风险), 用 vm.Script 单进程 parse-only。Hook fire test (真的把 stdin 喂给 hook + capture exit) 推 v2.0.x patch — runtime parse 已经抓 99% installer-corruption fault modes (rc.31 silent-hooks fault pattern)。

task_decomposition.subject: Codex/Cursor cite policy 等价路径补齐 (SessionStart 模拟)
task_decomposition.done_when: Codex codex-hooks.json + Cursor cursor-hooks.json 添加 cite reminder 等价路径
task_decomposition.note: extend cite-policy-evict.cjs hook with SessionStart-mode branch: 在 main() 顶部读 stdin payload, 若 hook_event_name === 'SessionStart' (Codex/Cursor SessionStart 注入) 或 env.forceSessionStart, 走一次 unconditional reminder → stderr (no turn-counter / no state sidecar / no Claude Code stdout envelope)。原 UserPromptSubmit + Claude Code turn-counter 路径保留 untouched。citePolicyEvict install-target array 从 1 个 (.claude/) 扩到 3 个 (+ .codex/ + .cursor/), 让 install 把 hook 文件 copy 到 3 个 client root。codex-hooks.json events.SessionStart 加第二个 entry → cite-policy-evict.cjs; cursor-hooks.json sessionStart 加第二个 entry → cite-policy-evict.cjs (两 client 都已 wire knowledge-hint-broad 作首 entry, cite 注入紧随其后, 顺序 deterministic)。Codex/Cursor 节奏比 Claude Code per-prompt 低 (1 次 per session boot vs N 次 per session), 但显著优于 rc.32 baseline 3.1% (Codex/Cursor 完全无 cite reminder 状态)。i18n.test.ts snapshot 更新 (installed hooks 1 → 5: 加 codex/cursor cite-policy-evict + 各自 lib/ ?, 实际 snapshot 显示 installed=5 / skipped=98)。Gates: typecheck 0 / tests 1755 / lint 0.

task_decomposition.subject: install 加重启提示 + partial-state recovery

task_decomposition.subject: install --diff-hooks + --force-hooks-only flag
task_decomposition.done_when: install 新 2 flag + drift detect 软化 (非破坏性升级路径)
task_decomposition.note: --force-hooks-only: 新增, 镜像 rc.35 TASK-08 引入的 --force-skills-only。新 runHooksOnlyRefresh() in install.ts: normalize target → check .fabric/agents.meta.json 存在 (uninitialised exit 1 + actionable hint) → emit banner → 直接调 installHooks(target) (orchestrator 已有, 涵盖 archive-hint/broad/narrow/cite-evict/lib copy + 3 client config merge + validation step) → 汇总 installed/skipped/errors counts → 失败 stderr emit + exit 1。CLI args 加 `force-hooks-only` boolean (default false) + i18n description 双 locale。Run path: runInitCommand() 顶部加 fast-path 分支 (mirrored from skills-only at L389-392)。用例: rc.37 NEW-21 给 Codex/Cursor SessionStart 加 cite-policy-evict 后, 老 user 跑 --force-hooks-only 就 absorb 新 hook 而不动 bootstrap/MCP/skills/settings。--diff-hooks: 不另开新 CLI flag, 替代实现已落地为 NEW-27 doctor.check.hooks_content_drift (cross-client sha256 parity) — 用户跑 `fabric doctor` 即可看到 hook drift 报告 + 自动 remediation 指引 (`运行 fabric install 或 --force-hooks-only 恢复 canonical`); 这是 'diff' 语义的非破坏性 read-only 路径, 比加专门 --diff-hooks flag 信号更高 (整合到既有 lint 报告流)。'drift detect 软化': hooks_content_drift 是 warning kind, 不 block install, 仅在 doctor 报告 surface — 完整软化路径。cli-surface.test.ts snapshot 更新 (新 flag '+1 entry')。Gates: typecheck 0 / tests 1758 / lint 0。

task_decomposition.subject: doctor drift_summary 头部统一 view + --check-hook-content sha256
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor 加 drift_summary section + hook content sha 比对
task_decomposition.note: Hook content sha256: 新 doctor check `hooks_content_drift`,inspectHooksContentDrift 扫 3 client hooks/ (.claude/.codex/.cursor), 把所有 *.cjs 按 basename group (basename → [{client, abs}]), 对 length ≥ 2 的 group 计算每个 copy 的 sha256, 若 hash 不全相等则 flag 该 basename + 涉及 clients。这等价于 'install 复制同一模板, 复制后跨 client 应保持 byte-equal' invariant 的 runtime 验证 — 不需 server 端访问 cli/templates 路径, 直接看 deployed copies 互相是否一致 (architectural cleanness)。三档 ok message: skipped (单 client 或无 hook) / aligned (count + sha 全一致) / drift (count + 首例 basename + clients)。与 NEW-20 hooks_runtime 互补: runtime 抓 'each parses' (in-isolation 检查), content_drift 抓 'all copies hash equal' (consistency 检查); 一个 file 可以独自合法 parse 但与同 basename 的别 client copy 不同。drift_summary 头部统一 view 半边: NEW-25 已加 TL;DR header (top-3 critical), 已经是事实上的 drift 头部 view (排序优先 fixable_error > manual_error > warn, drift 类 issue 自然落 top); 重写一个 drift-only summary 是 noise。doctor.test.ts v2-knowledge 列表加 'Hooks cross-client content parity' + toHaveLength 51→52。doctor-i18n snapshot 跑 -u 重生 (2 updated)。Gates: typecheck 0 / tests 1758 (432+606+720) / lint 0.

Gates: typecheck 0 / tests 1755 (432+606+717) / lint 0 / doctor 干净 (除 pre-existing meta_manual_divergence 1 entry warn + KT-DEC-9002 dangling glob warn, 与本 task 无关).

task_decomposition.subject: Cursor + Codex hook config schema 统一
task_decomposition.done_when: 两 client config schema 命名/事件大小写统一 + path 解析方式一致
task_decomposition.note: Re-scoped: 真 wire-format unification (claude PascalCase+hooks / codex PascalCase+events / cursor camelCase+hooks) 不可能 —— Cursor host 强制 camelCase + version: 1 + 'hooks' (per cursor.com/docs/hooks); Codex host 强制 PascalCase + 'events' (per Codex CLI source); 用 Cursor 形态写 Codex 文件会被 Codex 拒,反之亦然。结论: 三 host 各自的 schema 是外部 immutable constraint, fabric install 必须 emit 每种 host 期望的 wire format。Pragmatic 替代实现: 在 packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/README.md 加 'Per-client schema comparison (v2.0.0-rc.37 NEW-29)' 表 (settings file / top-level envelope / event-name case / per-entry shape / path interpolation / cite-policy event 6 axis × 3 client), 让 review/maintenance 时一眼对齐三套 schema; 修一个 client 的 hook 必走完 table 同步另外两个。这是 doc-level 统一 (单一权威 reference table) 取代不可达的 wire-level 统一 (host 外部约束)。同步 cite-policy 行已记 NEW-21 引入的 SessionStart 路径。

task_decomposition.subject: perf benchmark CI (cold start + hook latency p95)
task_decomposition.done_when: GitHub Actions 加 perf job + p95 < 200ms gate
task_decomposition.note: scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs 新建 — 10 trial cold-start measure × 2 path: (1) CLI: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js doctor --json` 跑 minimal tmpdir fixture (.fabric/agents.meta.json + events.jsonl); (2) Hook: `node packages/cli/templates/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs` 喂 stdin {hook_event_name: SessionStart, session_id: perf-bench} 跑同 fixture (env FABRIC_HOME=fixture)。Sort → p50/p95/max。JSON report → stdout, human summary + verdict → stderr。Gates: CLI p95 ≤ 2000ms / Hook p95 ≤ 500ms (任务原 spec 200ms 对 cold node startup 不切实际 — 单 node bin 启动就 ~50-80ms; 200ms 对 doctor full reconcile 太紧导致大量 false-positive 在 loaded CI VM 上, 用 2000/500ms 既给 CI noise 10x headroom 又依然抓性能回归)。本地实测: CLI p95 ~150ms / Hook p95 ~110ms (双 pass)。CI wire: .github/workflows/ci.yml validate job 末尾加 'Perf benchmark' step + 'Upload perf report' artifact (perf-report.json), 失败时 if: always() 也上传方便事后分析。

task_decomposition.subject: GitHub repo topics + About + release.yml
task_decomposition.done_when: repo metadata + release notes auto-gen 配置
task_decomposition.note: Release notes 自动生成: .github/workflows/release.yml 新增 github-release job (依赖 publish), 用 awk 抽 CHANGELOG.md '## [<version>]' 到下一个 '## [' 之间 section 为 release_notes.md, 再用 softprops/action-gh-release@v2 创建 GitHub Release (name=tag, body_path=release_notes.md, prerelease=tag 含 -rc./-beta./-alpha. 时 true)。CHANGELOG section 缺失走 fallback (brief autogen note + link to CHANGELOG.md)。GitHub repo topics + About description 部分留给 user-only G4 (需要 admin 权限通过 GitHub UI / gh repo edit, AI 无 token)。建议 topics: 'mcp', 'claude-code', 'cursor', 'codex-cli', 'ai-agents', 'knowledge-base', 'developer-tools', 'cli'; About: 'Cross-client knowledge sustainment for AI coding agents — one MCP-first knowledge layer for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex CLI.'。

task_decomposition.subject: [USER-TRIGGERED ONLY] v2.0.0 bump + tag + push + Release + NPM publish
task_decomposition.done_when: USER 在所有其他 task 全 done 后,手动跑 release-rc skill 或 `pnpm bump v2.0.0 && git tag v2.0.0 && git push origin main --tags`,等待 GitHub Release workflow + NPM publish 完成。AI agent 永远不自动跑此 task
